calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action (Change Of Venue Improper Court - Code Civ. Proc. 396a(B)); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Proceedings Or, In The Alternative, Stay Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Off Calendar

Joinder In Claudia Lewis Motion To Transfer Action (Change Of Venue Improper Court - Code Civ. Proc. 396a(B)
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Proceedings Or, In The Alternative, Stay Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Continued To Oct-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS OMEGA ELECTRIC SUPPLY, LLC., COYWOLF CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC, REID TARADASH, PHILIPP GRUNER, and PAUL IBANEZ' Motion To Consolidate Proceedings Or, In The Alternative, Stay Arbitration is continued to October 24, 2018 to trail the motion to transfer venue filed by defendant Claudia Lewis. If Ms. Lewis' motion is denied, at the October 24 hearing the court will set a schedule for the opposition papers, reply memorandum and hearing on this motion.
Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
